description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rounded rectangular form and a predominantly black exterior. The front features a large touchscreen display with a lock screen interface, including a digital clock, date, and notification icons. The back side displays a secondary e-ink screen with a circular clock widget, weather information, and city details, as well as a single camera lens and flash positioned near the top. The device is slim, with gently curved edges and a smooth, matte finish, and appears to be constructed primarily from plastic and glass. No external case or cover is present, and the phone's buttons are minimal and flush with the sides. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A slim, black smartphone with a large touchscreen on the front and a secondary e-ink display with a camera on the back. The device has a smooth, rounded design and minimal physical buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main touchscreen display with a lock screen interface, digital clock, and notification icons.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the phone's slimness and the presence of a single button on the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary e-ink screen with clock and weather widgets, and a single camera with flash at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the phone's thinness and absence of visible buttons.
attribute_screen_display_content: The front screen shows a lock screen with a digital clock (10:11), date (Wednesday, September 3), and notification icons. The back e-ink display shows a circular analog clock, date, weather widget for London (10°C, cloudy), and additional icons.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens and flash are located near the top center of the back side of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: One physical button is visible on the right edge of the phone, likely serving as a power or volume button.
